We do not claim measured slopes validate the asymptotic rates. Despite its fast escape,q=1q=1achieves lower test accuracy thanq=0.75q=0.75(TableÀú1), consistent with theO‚Äã(q/M‚ÄãPùúΩq+1)O(\nicefrac{{q}}{{MP_{\bm{\mathbf{\theta}}}^{q+1}}})ratio-estimator bias ofTheoremÀú6.1degrading gradient quality.

Figure 4:Warm-start validationmaj@16on HotPotQA atq=0.25q=0.25: GARL peaks at step 50 (30.6) and collapses to zero by step 100; PAFT remains stable throughout training and reaches 53.6. At fixedqq, the contrast isolates the estimator (prior-sampled, all-MMvs. posterior-resampled).
